data.title: Valkea Resources announces C$3M private placement
data.description:
• Valkea Resources (TSXV:OZ:CA) plans a non-brokered private placement of up to 12M units at C$0.25 each, raising up to C$3M.
  • Each unit includes one common share plus one-half of a warrant, with each whole warrant exercisable at C$0.35 for 18 months.
  • Proceeds will fund exploration activities at the Paana Project and broader portfolio in Finland’s Central Lapland Greenstone Belt.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Synergy CHC announces $20M long-term credit facility
data.description:
• Synergy CHC (NASDAQ:SNYR) has entered into a $20M term loan credit agreement, due May 2029 with ACP Agency, and the proceeds will be used to pay down debt and provide the Co. with growth capital.
  • Under the terms, the Co. received a $15M term loan at closing, with an interest rate of SOFR plus 8.5%.
  • The loan is interest-only through 2025, with quarterly principal payments of $0.18M beginning in Jan. 2026, increasing to $0.35M per quarter in 2027 and beyond.
  • A $2.5M delayed draw facility and $2.5M uncommitted term loan incremental facility are also available to the Co.
  • “We are very pleased to have completed our debt refinancing, which supports our growth strategy and significantly strengthens our capital structure,” said Jack Ross, CEO of Synergy.

data.title: Redwire pushes ahead with plans to help with manufacturing efforts on the Moon and Mars
data.description:
Redwire Corporation (NYSE:RDW) announced on Wednesday that its advanced lunar and Martian manufacturing technology has passed Critical Design Review with NASA participation. 

The company's Mason tool suite is designed to operate on the Moon and Mars to enable the construction of berms, landing pads, and roads for future lunar and Martian habitats. The project, managed under a Tipping Point agreement with NASA’s Space Technology Mission Directorate, is part of a $12.9 million award to prototype Mason for broader plans to support a long-term presence and exploration on the lunar surface.

Designed to be scalable and platform agnostic for use on different landers, rovers, or robotic arms, Mason can convert lunar or Martian regolith into a strong, solid material similar to concrete. Mason includes a grader tool called BASE (Blade for Autonomously Surfacing Environments), a compaction tool called PACT (Planetary Automated Compaction Tool), and a microwave sintering tool called M3LT (Microwave Melter of Martian and Lunar Terrain).

"Leveraging Redwire's unmatched in-space manufacturing experience, Mason technology is critical to enabling sustainable operations on the Moon and Mars surface," highlighted Redwire (NYSE:RDW) President of Space Missions, Tom Campbell

Established in 2020 through the merger of Adcole Space and Deep Space Systems, Redwire (RDW) has rapidly expanded its capabilities and market reach through a series of strategic acquisitions, including Made In Space (specializing in in-space 3D printing), Roccor (solar panels and deployable booms), LoadPath (payload launch technology), Oakman Aerospace, Deployable Space Systems (solar arrays), and most recently, Edge Autonomy (defense-focused drone manufacturing).

Shares of Redwire (RDW) shot up 8.5% in premarket action after gaining 6.5% on Tuesday.

data.title: Transocean says Q2 results to include $1.1B-$1.2B impairment due to rig disposal
data.description:
Transocean (NYSE:RIG) disclosed late Tuesday it plans to dispose two rigs, GSF Development Driller I and Discoverer Luanda, through sale or recycling, and is evaluating the potential disposal of two additional rigs, Development Driller III and Discoverer Inspiration, which previously were classified as held for sale.

As a result, Transocean (NYSE:RIG) said it expects Q2 results to include a non-cash charge in the $1.1B-$1.2B range associated with the impairment of the rigs and related assets.

Separately, at the company's recent Annual General Meeting in Switzerland, Transocean (RIG) shareholders approved various proposals, including amendments to its long-term incentive plan allowing for the issuance of an additional 16M shares, according to Investing.com.

data.title: Nixxy announces acquisition of Leadnova.ai platform assets from NexGenAI, reports $5.2M in May revenue
data.description:
• Nixxy (NASDAQ:NIXX) on Wednesday announced the acquisition of the Leadnova.ai platform assets from the NexGenAI suite of companies.
  • Nixxy also reported that it generated about $5.2 million in unaudited gross revenue for the month of May 2025, up from about $1.4 million in April 2025.
  • Leadnova.ai is a SaaS-based solution designed to support business development through data delivery, sales enablement, outreach automation, and engagement analytics.
  • As part of the asset acquisition, Nixxy will take ownership of the Leadnova.ai domain, front-end and back-end software, automation engines, structured data repositories, and API infrastructure.
  • Nixxy said it continues to target a $10 million monthly revenue run rate by August 2025.
  • Nixxy also announced the pricing of a registered direct offering for the sale and issuance of up to 846,667 shares of the company's common stock to a small group of accredited investors at a price per share of $1.50.
  • NIXX +8.33% premarket to $1.95.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: NatWest receives regulatory notice over breach of rules related to charges, disclosure
data.description:
UK-based NatWest Group (NYSE:NWG) announced on Wednesday the receipt of a regulatory notice over breach of rules related to charges levied on customers, disclosure of costs on overdrafts and loans, and the offering of a price and eligibility tool to clients.

NWG shares were -0.35% pre-market to $14.44.

The bank failed to provide the correct monthly maximum charge to about 104,800 customers on unarranged overdrafts, according to the statement by the UK Competition and Markets Authority.

NatWest failed to include the representative cost in equivalent annual rate terms of their overdrafts in its letters to 66,765 SME customers, which included an offer to renew an overdraft between May 2021 and February 2024.

Additionally, the Edinburgh-based lender could not continuously offer the price and eligibility tool, which enables SMEs to obtain an indicative price quote and indication of their eligibility for unsecured loans and standard tariff unsecured business overdrafts.

data.title: reAlpha appoints Mike Logozzo as CEO
data.description:
• reAlpha Tech (NASDAQ:AIRE) announced Wednesday that President and COO Mike Logozzo has been appointed CEO effective June 3, 2025.
  • Founder and former CEO Giri Devanur will now serve as Executive Chairman of the Board.
  • Logozzo will also act as Interim COO until a successor is named.

data.title: Stock index futures give up gains as job data comes in cooler than expected
data.description:
Stock index futures pared their earlier gains on Wednesday as the private sector job growth cooled more than consensus in May.

S&P 500 futures (SPX) were flat, Nasdaq 100 futures (US100:IND) -0.1%, and Dow futures (INDU) were flat.

The 10-year Treasury yield (US10Y) was down 5 basis points to 4.42%. The 2-year yield (US2Y) was down 2 basis points to 3.94%.

U.S. private sector employment grew by 37K in May, missing the +110K consensus and cooling from the 62K increase in April, according to data released by ADP. The pace of private hiring in May reached its lowest level since March 2023.

U.S. major averages ended Tuesday with solid gains as encouraging job openings data overshadowed a major intergovernmental organization downgrading its global and U.S. economic growth projections.

In trade news, Donald Trump said that Chinese President Xi Jinping has been “extremely hard” to strike a deal with, as the White House hinted at the possibility of the two leaders speaking this week amid escalating trade tensions.

"The mood was boosted yesterday by tech and semiconductor stocks, as Meta’s deal to enter a 20-year agreement with the largest U.S. nuclear operator seemed to energize the sector. The deal was said to be cheaper than a similar one powered by Microsoft last year, as it used existing facilities," Deutsche Bank's Jim Reid said.

One of the most important catalysts for the recovery was that JOLTS report, which showed the US labor market in a more robust position than previously thought, Reid added. 

Economists, on average, expect it to rise to 111K.

The May S&P Global Composite PMI is forecasted to come in at 52.1, while the ISM Non-Manufacturing PMI is expected to come in at 52.0.

data.title: U.S. private sector job growth cools more than consensus in May: ADP jobs report
data.description:
U.S. private sector employment grew by 37K in May, missing the +110K consensus and cooling from the 62K increase in April, according to data released by ADP on Wednesday. 

"After a strong start to the year, hiring is losing momentum," said Dr. Nela Richardson, chief economist, ADP. "Pay growth, however, was little changed in May, holding at robust levels for both job-stayers and job-changers."

Annual pay increased 4.5% Y/Y for those who stayed in their jobs, flat from the 4.5% Y/Y rise in April. Job changers, meanwhile, saw their annual pay increase accelerate to 6.9% from 6.7% in the previous month.

By sector, education and health services lost 13 jobs and professional/business services jobs dropped by 17K. Meanwhile, leisure/hospitality boosted rolls by 38K and financial activities added 20K.

By region, the West added 37K jobs, while the Northeast lost 19K.

data.title: FangDD to implement 1-for-16 share consolidation effective June 9
data.description:
• Fangdd Network (NASDAQ:DUO) will conduct a 1-for-16 share consolidation effective 8:00 a.m. ET on June 9, 2025.
  • The move aims to restore compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement.
  • Outstanding shares will be reduced from 62.47M to 3.90M as a result of the reverse split.
  • DUO shares fall 4% premarket on Wednesday.
  • Source: Press release
